To: S. Park (PM)
From: PC
Subject: Schedule Review

Hi S,

Thanks for sharing the snapshot. I had a look. Overall I think the project is in good shape — 71% complete at the end of month three is solid progress and most packages are showing green.

A few observations:

- WP-04 is at 78% which is great. M. Reyes is clearly delivering. I would say we are well on track for the Tier 1 reports.
- WP-05 and WP-07 are amber, but I think this is manageable. The teams will catch up. We should keep an eye on them.
- WP-08 (test environment) is also amber. We should reach out to the infra team to nudge them.
- The buffer situation looks fine — 2 weeks remaining is enough to absorb any small slips. I would not be too concerned at this stage.

For the steering committee on Friday, I think you can confidently report that the project is tracking well. The end date of 30 September looks achievable. The CCO will be reassured.

In terms of communication, I would leverage clear stakeholder messaging to drive a positive narrative around the project's progress. Good communication is critical at this stage to maintain confidence.

If there are specific risks you want me to dig into I am happy to do so. Otherwise I think the snapshot is broadly accurate and the message to the steering committee can be that we are on track.

Best,
PC
